label: Transparent Humpback motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Humpback transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated humpback whale fluke and upper whale silhouette motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A humpback whale breaching upward with an iconic wide fluke as the dominant shape, slate blue back, deep ocean blue shadowing, white ventral markings, soft spray grey highlights, accurate humpback anatomy, crisp silhouette edges, and subtle skin texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; the fluke should read clearly as the primary motif, with a small arc of whale body below, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves slate blue, white markings, spray grey, and calm oceanic depth.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject, no full ocean scene, no waves as background, no boat, no birds, no fish, no coral, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second whale, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 Morphous catalog light-mode design-system board
Input image: Use the visible transparent humpback whale fluke motif as the source reference for palette, texture, silhouette language, and component styling.
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Humpback" / "Humpback Whale", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme.
Visual direction: expansive storytelling system inspired by a humpback fluke rising from open ocean; calm editorial scale, wide navigation, long-form content rhythm, data-rich ocean research dashboard, slate-blue structure, white spray highlights, soft grey mist, pale ocean paper surfaces.
Palette to show with readable swatches and names: Ice Wake #F4F8F8, Fluke Slate #243F52, Deep Pelagic #102938, Spray Grey #B7C4C7, Whale White #F7F3EC, Kelp Shadow #476861, Sounding Blue #3F7890, Krill Rose #C27774, Sunlit Foam #E7D8B5.
Required board sections: palette, typography, English guidance, Japanese guidance, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, top navigation, side navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, empty state, error state, loading state, texture samples, radius tokens, spacing tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, sample usage.
Typography: show "Geist / Inter for English product UI" and "Noto Sans JP for Japanese labels"; include Japanese sample labels such as 物語, 観測, 記録, 状態, 詳細.
Component language: broad fluke-shaped section arcs, horizontal migration-track dividers, subtle spray speckle texture, calm generous spacing, 8px radius, thin slate borders, white foam active states, deep blue primary actions, muted grey secondary controls, rose warning accents only for alerts.
Layout: dense but readable professional board, large labels, no tiny illegible token tables, balanced margins, high-resolution 4K design poster.
Constraints: no generic blue-purple gradients, no one-note monochrome palette, no dark mode, no boats, no fish, no coral, no unrelated animals, no random brands, no watermark, avoid misspellings, keep all text large and readable.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 Morphous catalog dark-mode design-system board
Input images: Use the visible humpback whale fluke motif and the visible Morphous Humpback light-mode board as references. Translate the same system into dark mode, do not duplicate light surfaces.
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Humpback" / "Humpback Whale", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme.
Visual direction: expansive storytelling system inspired by a humpback fluke in open ocean at depth; dark pelagic background, luminous foam text, slate blue surfaces, moonlit spray grey borders, pale whale-white typography, controlled kelp-green support, krill-rose alert accents, sunlit foam focus highlights.
Palette to show with readable swatches and names: Abyss Ink #071722, Night Fluke #163143, Foam Text #F2F7F7, Moon Spray #8EA3AA, Deep Slate #0E2634, Kelp Glow #6C8F85, Sounding Cyan #67A7BD, Krill Signal #D08A86, Distant Foam #D8C79D.
Required board sections: palette, typography, English guidance, Japanese guidance, buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, top navigation, side navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, empty state, error state, loading state, texture samples, radius tokens, spacing tokens, border tokens, shadow tokens, sample usage.
Typography: show "Geist / Inter for English product UI" and "Noto Sans JP for Japanese labels"; include Japanese sample labels such as 物語, 観測, 記録, 状態, 詳細.
Component language: broad fluke-shaped section arcs, horizontal migration-track dividers, subtle spray speckle texture, calm generous spacing, 8px radius, thin moon-spray borders, foam active states, sounding-cyan chart emphasis, deep slate cards, rose warning accents only for alerts.
Layout: dense but readable professional board, large labels, no tiny illegible token tables, balanced margins, high-resolution 4K design poster.
Constraints: no light-mode white background, no generic blue-purple gradients, no neon cyberpunk, no one-note monochrome palette, no boats, no fish, no coral, no unrelated animals, no random brands, no watermark, avoid misspellings, keep all text large and readable.
